subcodes.first_line: O esteemed leaf, tranquil handmaiden of God! Intone such a melody in the gatherings of the maidservants of the All-Merciful that shall enrapture all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه محترمه امة الله المطمئنه در مجامع اماء رحمان چنان ترتیلی کن که کل را
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
